final:
module RefModule(
    input [1:0] data_in,
    input enable,
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);

always @(*) begin
    if (enable) begin
        data_out = 4'b0000;
        data_out[data_in] = 1'b1;
    end else begin
        data_out = 4'b0000;
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
